title: Umbra Poor Ores Thermal Addon
description: Adds Thermal Ore generators to Umbra Poor Ores
body:
Thermal addon for Umbra Poor Ores:

Adds Thermal generator Tier 1, 2 and 3
- Tier 1 generates Tin, Sulfur, Niter and Apatite
- Tier 2 generates Tin, Lead, Nickel, Sulfur, Niter, Apatite, Cinnabar and Oil Sand
- Tier 3 generates Tin, Lead, Nickel, Silver, Sulfur, Niter, Apatite, Cinnabar, Ruby, Sapphire and Oil Sand

Also adds recipes for thermal ores made from Poor Ore materials.

Requires [Thermal Foundation](https://modrinth.com/mod/thermal-foundation) and [Umbra Poor Ores](https://modrinth.com/mod/umbra-poor-ores)
